title: the Post Office Savings Bank General (Amendment) Rules, 2002.
description: the Post Office Savings Bank General (Amendment) Rules, 2002.
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 219| NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, MAY 10, 2002/VAISAKHA20,1924 MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th May, 2002 G.S.R. 348(E):— In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 15 of the Government Savings Banks Act, 1873 (5 of 1873), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Post Office Savings Bank General Rules, 1981, namely:— 1. (1) These Rules may be called the Post Office Savings Bank General (Amendment) Rules, 2002. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in Official Gazette. 2. In the Post Office Savings Bank General Rules, 1981,— (a) In rule 8, in sub-rule (3), for the words "two rupees", the words "ten rupees" shall be substituted; 1519 GI/2002 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OFINDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—Str. 3 (i)l (b) for rule 11. the following rule shall be substituted, namely :—• "11. Final withdrawal on closure.—Except as otherwise provided in the relevant rules, final withdrawal on closure of an account shall be allowed at the Post Offices authorised by the Director General (Posts)". [F. No. 2/25/2001NS-IFJ K.Y. NARASIMHAN. Dy. Secy. Note :— The principal rules were published vide G.S.R. 662(E), dated the 17th December. 1981 and subsequently amended vide G.S R. 483(E). dated the 10th June. 1983, G.S.R 723(E). dated the 4th September. 1985, GSR 1000(E). dated the 1st January, 1990 and GSR 490(E), dated the 6th July, 1999. NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th May. 2002. G.S.R. J49(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 15 of the Government Savings Banks Act, 1873 (5 of 1873). the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Post Office Savings Account Rules, 1981. namely :— 1.(1) These Rules may be called the Post Office Savings Account (Amendment) Rules, 2002. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in Official Gazette. 2 In the Post Office Savings Account Rules. 1981, in rule 5.— (a) In sub-rule (4), for the words "twenty rupees", the words "fifty rupees" and for the words "two hundred and fifty rupees", the words "five hundred rupees" shall be substituted; (b) in sub-rule (6). for the words "five rupees" the words "twenty rupees" shall be substituted. [F.NO.2/2.V2001NS-II] K. Y. NARASIMHAN, Dy. Secy. Note: The principal rules were published vide G.S.R.. 663(E). dated the 17th December, 1981 and subsequently amended vide G.S.R. 8(E), dated the 2nd January. 1987, G.S.R. 948(E), dated the 2nd December. 1987. GSR. 5(E), dated the 5th January, 1989, G.S.R. 430(E), dated the 6th April. 1989, G.S.R. 695(E), datedthe 17th July, 1989, G S.R. 813(E), dated the 4lh September. 1989, G.S.R. 1001(E), dated the 8th November, 1989. G.S.R. 499(E), dated the 8th July, 1993 and G.S.R. 165(E), datedthe 28thFebruary, 2000. Printed by thtf Manager, Oovi. of India Press. Ring Road. Maynpuri.
